name: Landing Page
description: A marketing landing page with bold hero, key benefits, testimonials, portfolio gallery, and strong call-to-action

fields.heading: Launch Your Next Big Idea
fields.subheading: From concept to live site in days, not months. The fastest way to build professional websites that convert.

fields.heading: Why Teams Choose Us
fields.subheading: Three pillars that set us apart from every other platform.

features.title: Ship Faster
features.description: Pre-built blocks and page templates mean you spend less time building and more time growing. Go from blank page to polished site in hours.

features.title: Convert More
features.description: Optimized for Core Web Vitals out of the box. Faster pages mean higher search rankings, lower bounce rates, and more conversions.

features.title: Stay Secure
features.description: Sandboxed scripting, role-based access control, and a minimal attack surface keep your site and your data safe without extra configuration.

testimonials.quote: We replaced three different tools with Squilla and cut our monthly costs in half. The all-in-one approach just works.
Our page speed scores went from the 40s to consistent 95+ across every page. The performance gains were immediate and dramatic.

fields.heading: Stop Waiting. Start Building.
fields.body: Join the teams that have already made the switch. Get started with a free trial and see the difference in minutes.
